steps.title: Name the knowledge gap
steps.content: The second sentence explains that astronomers do not know when Betelgeuse will explode because its internal characteristics are largely unknown. That gap sets up the work in the next sentence.

steps.title: Link the gap to the study
steps.content: Morrow and colleagues investigated whether acoustic waves could reveal those internal characteristics, but the method was not sufficient. Choice A describes the method's limitation, not the second sentence itself. Choice B misplaces the finding, and Choice D invents field reception. The answer is C.
